summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Oryno service booking platform. Visual polish enhancements successfully implemented including hover animations, interactive notifications, and enhanced empty states. Login flow works correctly and dashboard displays properly with charts. Minor session persistence issues identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 authentication error for customer orders
minor_bugs.impact: Orders page may not load user's order history

session_issues.issue: Session persistence issues causing redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session expires quickly, preventing full navigation testing

passed_tests: Login flow with admin credentials (admin@test.com / testpassword123)
Dashboard page loads correctly with charts (pie chart, area chart)
Visual polish enhancements implemented (hover animations, click feedback)
Stats cards display with proper hover effects and animations
Spending by Category pie chart renders correctly
Weekly Activity area chart displays properly
Quick Actions section with hover effects
Recent Orders section with proper styling
Admin Dashboard banner visible for admin user
Notification bell is present in header
Consistent empty states with floating icons
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issues in authentication flow to prevent frequent redirects to login page. Consider increasing session timeout or fixing token refresh mechanism. The orders API endpoint authentication issue should also be resolved.
